title_en: Fever vs Mercury Recap — Firepower: rookies vs veterans
title_zh: Fever vs Mercury 回顾 — 新人与老将的火力对比
summary_en: Usage and points per possession comparison: veterans steadier leading efficiency and clutch involvement.
summary_zh: 新人使用率与每回合得分（PPP）对比，老将带队效率与关键球参与度更稳。
highlights_zh: 新人 PPP：0.98 vs 老将 PPP：1.12
storyline_en: Opening: rookies probed pace and shot selection.
Mid-game: veterans controlled flow, neutralizing scheme changes.
Closing: clutch plays driven by experienced core.
storyline_zh: 开局：新人试探节奏与投射选择。
中段：老将控场，以经验化解防守变化。
收尾：关键球由经验核心主导。
tactics_en: Mismatch targeting: chained screens to create slow-foot mismatches.
Tempo control: reduce turnovers, improve PPP.
tactics_zh: 错位针对：通过连续掩护制造慢防错位
节奏转换：降低失误，提升每回合产出
